aesKey.description: AES key as hex, base64, or UTF-8 text. This is the preferred source for V3.7.6 encryption material.

aesIv.description: AES IV as hex, base64, or UTF-8 text. This is the preferred source for V3.7.6 encryption material.

aesKeyHex.description: Alias for aesKey when stored as hexadecimal text.

aesIvHex.description: Alias for aesIv when stored as hexadecimal text.

aesKeyBase64.description: Alias for aesKey when stored as base64 text.

aesIvBase64.description: Alias for aesIv when stored as base64 text.
